Item Name: Ghirardelli Chocolate Squares Holiday Assortment, Individually Wrapped Candy, 14.8 Ounces
Product Description: Limited Edition Dark Chocolate Mint. Peppermint Bark. Milk Chocolate Caramel. Dark Chocolate 60% Cacao. Peppermint bark with other natural flavor. From bean to bar our commitment to ultimate quality. Celebrate the holidays with our rich, slow-melting chocolate and luscious fillings. Select high quality beans. Roast nibs for intensity. Refine for smoothness. Conche for flavor. Ghirardelli of San Francisco since 1852. Product sold by weight, not by volume or count. Flavor assortment may vary. Contents may settle during shipping. ghirardelli.com/sustainability. Cocoa Farming Program: For more information about our ingredients ad sustainable sourcing visit ghirardelli.com/sustainability.
Value: 14.8

variant: Limited Edition Holiday Chocolate Assortment (Dark Chocolate Mint, Peppermint Bark, Milk Chocolate Caramel, Dark Chocolate 60% Cacao)
overall_summary: A premium, limited-edition holiday chocolate assortment positioned as a high-end gifting product. The packaging features luxury design elements like a ribbon and festive decorations, reinforcing its special occasion appeal. The inclusion of multiple high-quality chocolates and the brand’s heritage (founded in 1852) justify a premium price point, while the 14.8 oz size offers a generous quantity for a mid-tier gift basket. The 'from bean to bar' commitment to quality and natural flavors further supports a higher price relative to standard mass-market chocolates.
